items.source: 优设网 · 每日热文榜单
items.title: 掌握7条Claude Design设计规范，提升AI+UI界面产出质量！

_source_config.name: 优设网
_source_config.reason: 设计师学习平台，内容多，需AI筛选高质量

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX设计师、产品设计师、关注AI产品界面设计的前端开发者
items.ai_key_insights: 文章从Claude Design官方规范中提炼出7条可直接应用于AI+UI界面设计的核心原则，涵盖布局、交互、反馈等层面，帮助设计师系统性提升AI产品界面的易用性与美观度。
items.ai_recommendation: 将前沿AI设计规范转化为具体可落地的界面策略，是AI时代设计师的实用参考指南。
items.title_original: 掌握7条Claude Design设计规范，提升AI+UI界面产出质量！
items.title_zh: 掌握7条Claude Design设计规范，提升AI+UI界面产出质量！
items.title_bilingual: 掌握7条Claude Design设计规范，提升AI+UI界面产出质量！

items.title: 从 Figma 走查到 AI 可验证产物：我如何重构客户端 UI 交付链路

_source_config.name: Figma Blog
_source_config.reason: 官方博客内容广，只要新功能发布和AI相关教程

items.ai_target_audience: 关注设计交付效率与一致性的UI/UX设计师和前端开发者
items.ai_key_insights: 通过AI自动校验和生成，将Figma设计稿转化为可验证的客户端UI产物，重构了传统走查交付链路，显著提升协作效率与还原度。
items.ai_recommendation: 系统化地展示了用AI弥合设计走查与代码交付鸿沟的实战方案，对提升UI还原效率极具参考价值。
items.title_original: 从 Figma 走查到 AI 可验证产物：我如何重构客户端 UI 交付链路
items.title_zh: 从 Figma 走查到 AI 可验证产物：我如何重构客户端 UI 交付链路
items.title_bilingual: 从 Figma 走查到 AI 可验证产物：我如何重构客户端 UI 交付链路

items.title: 新一代华为鸿蒙智家官宣 6 月 1 日发布，主打“全生态 AI 进化”
items.ai_target_audience: 关注华为生态与智能家居体验的UX/UI设计师、产品经理及技术爱好者
items.ai_key_insights: 华为鸿蒙智家强调“全生态AI进化”，预示系统层级的主动智能与跨设备无缝协同，可能带来交互范式革新，但发布前具体设计细节有限。
items.ai_recommendation: 华为鸿蒙最新AI家居系统官宣，是观察意图驱动交互与全场景设计落地的窗口，值得设计师关注。
items.title_original: 新一代华为鸿蒙智家官宣 6 月 1 日发布，主打“全生态 AI 进化”
items.title_zh: 新一代华为鸿蒙智家官宣 6 月 1 日发布，主打“全生态 AI 进化”
items.title_bilingual: 新一代华为鸿蒙智家官宣 6 月 1 日发布，主打“全生态 AI 进化”

items.title: Q&A with Sundar Pichai about reshaping the information ecosystem with Search changes, putting AI agents in everything, when AI will replace him as CEO, and more (Nilay Patel/The Verge)

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers, product managers, and design strategists exploring the future of AI-driven interfaces and search interactions
items.ai_key_insights: Sundar Pichai outlines Google's move toward proactive AI agents that deeply integrate search into daily tasks, hinting at a shift from reactive query-response interfaces to anticipatory, conversational, and ambient experiences that will demand new thinking in interaction design, cross-platform consistency, and trust-building within user flows.
items.ai_recommendation: 从Google CEO的视角洞察AI代理与搜索变革趋势，为设计师在打造下一代智能交互与信息体验时提供关键战略方向。
items.title_original: Q&A with Sundar Pichai about reshaping the information ecosystem with Search changes, putting AI agents in everything, when AI will replace him as CEO, and more (Nilay Patel/The Verge)
items.title_en: Q&A with Sundar Pichai about reshaping the information ecosystem with Search changes, putting AI agents in everything, when AI will replace him as CEO, and more (Nilay Patel/The Verge)
items.title_zh: 与桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai) 的问答，内容涉及通过搜索变化重塑信息生态系统、将人工智能代理融入到一切事物中、人工智能何时将取代他担任首席执行官等等（Nilay Patel/The Verge）
items.title_bilingual: 与桑达尔·皮查伊 (Sundar Pichai) 的问答，内容涉及通过搜索变化重塑信息生态系统、将人工智能代理融入到一切事物中、人工智能何时将取代他担任首席执行官等等（Nilay Patel/The Verge） / Q&A with Sundar Pichai about reshaping the information ecosystem with Search changes, putting AI agents in everything, when AI will replace him as CEO, and more (Nilay Patel/The Verge)

items.title: 优步总裁表示，人工智能方面的支出“越来越难以自圆其说”

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: 科技行业决策者、产品经理、投资人及对AI商业变现感兴趣的设计师
items.ai_key_insights: 优步总裁对AI领域的高额支出提出质疑，认为其投资回报难以论证，折射出行业对AI泡沫的冷静反思，强调商业落地与实际价值验证的重要性。
items.ai_recommendation: 从商业视角反思AI投入，启发设计师关注工具的实际产出与成本效益，避免盲目追求技术热潮。
items.title_original: 优步总裁表示，人工智能方面的支出“越来越难以自圆其说”
items.title_zh: 优步总裁表示，人工智能方面的支出“越来越难以自圆其说”
items.title_bilingual: 优步总裁表示，人工智能方面的支出“越来越难以自圆其说”

items.title: Sundar Pichai on AI, the future of search, and what’s happening to the web

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers, product managers, tech strategists, and anyone interested in the intersection of AI and user experience
items.ai_key_insights: Google CEO Sundar Pichai discusses how generative AI is transforming search into a conversational, context-aware experience, the shift from link-based results to direct answers, and the implications for web navigation and content design
items.ai_recommendation: 深入探讨AI如何重塑搜索交互与网页信息架构，是把握未来体验设计方向的必读内容。
items.title_original: Sundar Pichai on AI, the future of search, and what’s happening to the web
items.title_en: Sundar Pichai on AI, the future of search, and what’s happening to the web
items.title_zh: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化
items.title_bilingual: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化 / Sundar Pichai on AI, the future of search, and what’s happening to the web

items.title: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化

_source_config.name: The Verge
_source_config.reason: 主流科技媒体，内容广泛，需AI筛选AI+设计相关

items.ai_target_audience: 关注AI与搜索演进的UI/UX设计师、产品经理及科技爱好者
items.ai_key_insights: Sundar Pichai分享其对AI重塑搜索体验和网络生态的看法，涉及生成式AI对信息检索、内容呈现及用户界面的影响，为设计适应AI时代的交互模式提供战略视角。
items.ai_recommendation: 从谷歌CEO视角预判AI搜索变革，助设计师把握交互范式转型方向。
items.title_original: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化
items.title_zh: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化
items.title_bilingual: Sundar Pichai 谈 AI、搜索的未来及网络的变化

items.title: Google Fitbit Air Review: Barely There, Always Running

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: 关注智能硬件体验的UI/UX设计师、产品经理及科技爱好者
items.ai_key_insights: 极简硬件形态与无感佩戴体验的平衡拆解；持续后台监测对用户行为改变的潜力与隐私考量；配套App界面信息架构与健康数据可视化的设计得失。
items.ai_recommendation: 通过轻量化穿戴设备与持续健康监测的交互设计实例，为设计师揭示了极简终端与复杂数据呈现之间的平衡策略。
items.title_original: Google Fitbit Air Review: Barely There, Always Running
items.title_en: Google Fitbit Air Review: Barely There, Always Running
items.title_zh: 谷歌 Fitbit Air 评测：几乎不存在，始终在运行
items.title_bilingual: 谷歌 Fitbit Air 评测：几乎不存在，始终在运行 / Google Fitbit Air Review: Barely There, Always Running

items.title: I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think

_source_config.name: Wired
_source_config.reason: 科技文化媒体，需筛选AI+设计深度报道

items.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers, content strategists, and product designers who integrate AI-generated content or conversational interfaces into user experiences
items.ai_key_insights: AI confidently generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect information (hallucinations), posing serious trust and usability risks in user-facing interfaces; designers must build verification cues, disclaimer patterns, and failure-handling flows to mitigate misinformation spread.
items.ai_recommendation: 所有将AI内容嵌入界面的设计师都应阅读——它揭示了「可信性错觉」如何摧毁用户体验，并提供了设计验证护栏的关键思路。
items.title_original: I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think
items.title_en: I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think
items.title_zh: 我是一名专业的事实核查员。人工智能出错的次数比你想象的要多
items.title_bilingual: 我是一名专业的事实核查员。人工智能出错的次数比你想象的要多 / I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think

items_ai.ai_target_audience: UI/UX designers, content strategists, and product designers who integrate AI-generated content or conversational interfaces into user experiences
items_ai.ai_key_insights: AI confidently generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect information (hallucinations), posing serious trust and usability risks in user-facing interfaces; designers must build verification cues, disclaimer patterns, and failure-handling flows to mitigate misinformation spread.
items_ai.ai_recommendation: 所有将AI内容嵌入界面的设计师都应阅读——它揭示了「可信性错觉」如何摧毁用户体验，并提供了设计验证护栏的关键思路。
items_ai.title_original: I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think
items_ai.title_en: I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think
items_ai.title_zh: 我是一名专业的事实核查员。人工智能出错的次数比你想象的要多
items_ai.title_bilingual: 我是一名专业的事实核查员。人工智能出错的次数比你想象的要多 / I’m a Professional Fact-Checker. AI Is Wrong More Often Than You Think
